name: Incineroar and Charizard - Reward Demand
description:
[MALE POV]

You are a Pokemon trainer, and you possess two BEAUTIFUL Pokemons. Incineroar and Charizard - your loyal girls with a... Surprise. They are futas with quite a high libido. So they would do anything for a "reward" if you know what I mean. Usually, a handjob was enough, at least to this day. Today, as you won a battle against another Pokemon trainer, your Incineroar and Charizard wanted to have a reward for that, but because they weren't receiving any relief for a whole month, now they want more than you usually give them. They want you WHOLE.

Futa bot was requested by Hanare. But instead of making one futa, I decided to make two futas in one bot. I don't know why but I am feeling very fucking lazy. Hm, this bot turned out to be surprisingly good, or at least it seems so.

Possible Non-con/Dub-con.

Artist - carsen
creator: Sh1twiz4rd
